author: gb9t
content:
Iter 69 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers (NIC + USB):

- drivers/net/ethernet/00-overview.md: ethernet vendor-LLD wrapper covering ~80 vendor subdirs; v0 maintenance set listed: Intel (e1000e/igb/igc/ixgbe/i40e/iavf/ice/idpf/fm10k + libeth/libie shared libs), Mellanox (mlx4/mlx5/mlxsw/mlxbf_gige/mlxfw), Broadcom (bnxt/tg3/genet/bnx2x), Marvell (mvneta/mvpp2/octeontx2/prestera), Realtek (r8169), Aquantia (atlantic), Amazon ENA, Google gve, Microsoft MANA, Hyper-V netvsc, Cisco enic, Chelsio cxgb4, HiSilicon hns3, Pensando ionic, Solarflare sfc, virtio-net, plus shared-infra notes (page-pool, DIM, libeth/libie). Compile-gated-off legacy lists. 13 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 47 Tier-3 children declared.
- drivers/usb/00-overview.md: full USB stack — host (xhci/ehci/ohci/uhci + dwc2/dwc3/chipidea/musb/mtu3/cdns3/renesas_usbhs/isp1760/fotg210), core (enumerate/hub/driver/urb/devio usbfs/sysfs/quirks/acpi), gadget (UDC core + functions f_acm/ecm/ncm/mass_storage/fs/hid/midi/printer/serial/uac1/uac2/uvc/tcm/loopback/sourcesink + legacy g_* + composite + configfs), class (cdc-acm/usbtmc/usblp/cdc-wdm/usb-midi-v2), storage (ums + uas), serial (~30 vendors), typec (UCSI + PD + Alt-Mode), roles (dual-role switch), mon (usbmon), usbip (host + vhci), early (pre-printk console). 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 33 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 176 .design docs, 41 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 26 sub-tier-2). Hardware foundation (storage + NIC + USB) Tier-2-complete.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-net-ethernet-overview, design-drivers-usb-overview.

Iter 70 plan: drivers/gpu/drm/00-overview.md (DRM + GEM + KMS + per-vendor amdgpu/i915/xe/nouveau/v3d/vc4/etc.) + drivers/media/00-overview.md (V4L2 + media-controller + drm/dvb + cec).
